parameters.responseBody: ={{ { accepted: true, action: 'extension_approved', message: 'SQL proposal generated and sent to the application.' } }}
={{ { accepted: true, action: 'execute_sql', message: 'Execution result sent to the application.' } }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { accepted: true, action: $json.action, alert_id: $json.alert_id, message: 'No Oracle action required.' } }];
return [{ json: { accepted: false, action: $json.action || 'unknown', message: `Unsupported DBA command action: ${$json.action || 'unknown'}` } }];
